description: Function identification rename database for Spider-Man 3 (Xbox 360). The full master database contains 18,871 identified functions out of 43,676 total (43.21% coverage), derived from RTTI vtable recovery, instruction patterns, call-graph subsystem clustering, string references, and import callsite analysis.

merge_rules.source_priority: manual/import_thunk > import_callsite > vtable_rtti > string_ref > instruction_pattern > callgraph_hub > callgraph_subsystem
merge_rules.conflict_resolution: highest (confidence*100 + source_rank) wins; ties keep earlier-applied

rename_database.note: The full 18,871-entry master JSON is 16.94 MB / 631,149 lines / 43,676 function records - too large to bundle inline in the app's patch resources. It ships as a separate data asset and is referenced here by path. The apply_patches stage resolves each 'path' relative to the app's resource root (where this patches/ tree lives) or to an absolute path override supplied via the game profile. At bundle time, compute the sha256 of funcid_06_master.json and fill in the field below; the apply stage verifies it after copying the asset into place.

master_json.description: Master function identification database: per-address records with symbol, semantic name, confidence, source, evidence, subsystem membership, call-depth, and alternative names. 43,676 total records (18,871 named + 24,805 unidentified).

rename_csv.description: Flat sub_XXXXXXXX -> new_name map consumed by the rename script. This is the authoritative input for the apply step; the master JSON is the provenance/audit record.

rename_script.description: Rename map applier. Whole-token, word-boundary-guarded text substitution of sub_XXXXXXXX symbols across the generated .cpp/.h tree. Supports --apply (in-place, with .bak backup) and dry-run modes. Writes rename_manifest.txt of all replacements.

source_files.funcid_00_addr_table.json: universe of 43676 addrs (174 import thunks + 43502 generated)
source_files.funcid_03_vtables.json: 10086 functions from RTTI vtable recovery (2802 classes)

sample_entries.name: AtomicAddRef
sample_entries.evidence: 1 ldarx, 2 stdcx CAS loop, addi+1 refcount increment

sample_entries.name: Vector3DistanceDot
sample_entries.evidence: 38 VMX instr, vsubfp+vdot 4x4 dot, SIMD distance
